changes.old: He ought to be left well alone.
changes.new: He had to be set aside.
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's “He had to be set aside”; lasciare da parte = to set aside/exclude him from the conspiracy, not the English idiom “leave well alone”, which contradicts the following clause about getting rid of him.
